DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PLAINTIFF'S EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR WRIT OF ATTACHMENT IS DENIED AS PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO MEET ITS BURDEN OF SHOWING THAT PLAINTIFF WILL SUFFER GREAT OR IRREPARABLE INJURY IF THE ORDER IS NOT ISSUED BEFORE THE MATTER CAN BE HEARD ON NOTICE. THERE IS NO EVIDENCE SUPPORTING A FINDING THAT THE PROPERTY SOUGHT WILL BE CONCEALED, SUBSTANTIALLY IMPAIRED IN VALUE, OR MADE UNAVAILABLE TO LEVY BY OTHER THAN CONCEALMENT OR IMPAIRMENT IN VALUE.
